note: Claude fills these from news + live quotes. signal_sim trades any signal with direction in (bullish,bearish), confidence >= 0.6, already_priced_in == false, and no open position. Percent levels are relative to live entry price.

scenarios.trigger: Hormuz disruption persists, oil holds > $78, energy keeps leading
oil consolidates at high level, XLE chops sideways
US-Iran ceasefire / de-escalation, oil dumps, energy gives back gains

key_risks: sudden ceasefire or de-escalation collapses the oil premium
high oil prices cause demand destruction
sector already extended +3-5% over two sessions
signals.reasoning: 油价因霍尔木兹海峡美伊冲突 +8%，能源板块连续两日领涨，地缘催化剂仍在升级而非缓和。方向看多，但板块已涨不少，止损收紧防反转。
